basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode – Academic Support Executive – 1 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Academic Support Executive. Candidates Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 09-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIM Kozhikode official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-graduation with 2 years of experience OR Graduation with 3 years of experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Academic Support Executive Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: IIM Kozhikode Academic Support Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
